output:
**[REASONING CONTEXT]**
Amplify: temporal_horizon_normalization — track each period independently without compounding errors.
Suppress: single_discount_rate_assumption — don't skip intermediate balances or lump transactions together.
**[END REASONING CONTEXT]**

Working through each year sequentially:

| Year | Start Balance | After 8% Interest | Transaction | End Balance |
|------|--------------|-------------------|-------------|-------------|
| 1 | $10,000.00 | $10,800.00 | −$500 | **$10,300.00** |
| 2 | $10,300.00 | $11,124.00 | −$800 | **$10,324.00** |
| 3 | $10,324.00 | $11,149.92 | +$300 | **$11,449.92** |
| 4 | $11,449.92 | $12,365.91 | −$1,200 | **$11,165.91** |

**The account balance after the Year 4 transaction is $11,166.**
